LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER, CALENDAR OF JUL-08-1997 CONSIDERING THE PAPERS, EVIDENCE & ARGUMENTS, THE COURT FINDS THAT 37.9(C) PROVISION IN QUESTION IS FOR STATISTICAL PURPOSES AND NOT AN ESSENTIAL ELEMENT OF AN UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTION; THEREFORE, THE MOTION IS DENIED.
